global.description: The ad features a blue background with prominent text and a call-to-action button.
global.main_message: Promoting an exclusive offer from StarVault.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: StarVault
elements.description: Bold, large text at the top of the ad, colored in a contrasting shade to stand out.

elements.label: Exclusive tonight
elements.description: Medium-sized text in the center, conveying urgency and exclusivity.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with a clear call to action, inviting users to engage.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: An abstract shape in the center, possibly a placeholder for an image or graphic.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: Another abstract shape, smaller and positioned near the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular element that adds to the decorative aspect of the ad.

elements.label: Rectangle shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape that could serve as a placeholder for additional content.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: Another small circular element, complementing the overall design.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small element positioned towards the bottom, contributing to the overall layout.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: Another small element, similar in size and position to the previous one.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular element, adding to the decorative theme.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: Another small circular element, enhancing the visual complexity.

elements.label: Exclusive tonight text
elements.description: Text at the bottom of the ad, emphasizing urgency and exclusivity.

elements.label: StarVault headline
elements.description: Bold text at the top, prominently displaying the brand name.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, simple and modern, StarVault, exclusive offer.
embedding_texts.layout_text: Headline at the top, body text in the center, and CTA button at the bottom.
